name: Lasagna Torte
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Frozen leaf spinach, thawed and squeezed dry (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over high heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until soft, about 8 minutes.
3. Place the onions in a medium-sized bowl.
4. Add tomatoes to the skillet and break them up with a spoon.
5. Add garlic and carrots; bring to boil.
6. Lower heat; simmer, covered, for 10 minutes. Uncover and simmer another 10 minutes.
7. Stir in basil and salt; set sauce aside.
8. Wash spinach leaves thoroughly.
9. Place spinach in a large pot over high heat and cook until wilted, about 3 minutes.
10. Drain and squeeze dry the spinach.
11. Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions; drain.
12. Preheat oven to moderate (350°F).
13. Line a 9-inch springform pan with aluminum foil and grease it.
14. Add ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, and pepper to the reserved onion mixture; stir to combine.
15. Trim lasagna noodles to fit the pan and layer them.
16. Spread one-third of the ricotta mixture evenly over the noodles.
17. Cover with one-third of the spinach, one-quarter of the tomato sauce, and one-quarter of the fontina cheese.
18. Repeat layers two more times using noodle trimmings as one layer.
19. Top with remaining noodles, quarter of the sauce, and fontina cheese.
20. Bake until hot, 50 minutes to an hour. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
21. Remove sides of the pan.
